base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of powerup_cross_screen_clear — a pickup_item from 1986 castlevania. Cross — 2-frame sparkle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Cross — 2-frame sparkle; clears all enemies on screen when collected
